title: Lucid (LCID) misses Q3 earnings estimates, but there's some good news
text: Lucid missed Q3 2025 earnings estimates but reported some positive developments. The company narrowed its 2025 production guidance to around 18,000 vehicles from a previous forecast of between 18,000 and 20,000 units for the second consecutive quarter. Despite the miss and guidance cuts, the company continued to demonstrate progress on the Gravity SUV ramp and maintained strong liquidity positions through PIF funding. Analysts noted that while near-term profitability remained elusive, the company's focus on production scaling and cost reduction provided some encouragement for longer-term investors.
